predicted_pattern: 2022 only is unusually high and later years return near a normal level
supporting_evidence: 2022 is the highest complete annual total
interpretation_boundary: High point is observed; normalisation versus a counterfactual is not identified.

predicted_pattern: A sustained post-2022Q4 fall, especially visitor-oriented weekend/evening demand and neighbouring areas
observed_facts: post/pre sales mean change -23.6%; event date is verified
supporting_evidence: The official event date falls in 2022Q4
counter_evidence: No visitor origin, exposure intensity, or causal control is available; break timing can reflect concurrent changes
interpretation_boundary: Temporal coincidence is not causal attribution.

predicted_pattern: Leeum falls while independent nearby areas or same industries rise
supporting_evidence: Independent-area indices diverge descriptively after removing the verified overlapping tourism-zone candidate
counter_evidence: No movement paths, store-address transitions, or origin-destination data; an equal-weight comparison is not evidence of transfer
interpretation_boundary: Spatial co-movement is descriptive only; it does not identify consumer displacement.

predicted_pattern: Dated redevelopment exposure overlaps residential/daytime demand weakening
observed_facts: No redevelopment boundary or dated relocation/demolition input available
interpretation_boundary: Redevelopment cannot be inserted as an assumed cause.

predicted_pattern: Total stores are stable but industry shares/turnover change
observed_facts: 2022→2025 stores 4.7%; every observed industry has lower sales: 일식음식점, 커피-음료, 한식음식점, 양식음식점
supporting_evidence: Total average store count is broadly stable
counter_evidence: All observed industries decline and there is no business/address identifier to observe replacement
interpretation_boundary: Stable total stores do not establish industry reorganization; the available pattern is broad sales decline.

predicted_pattern: Transactions and transactions per store fall even if store count remains stable
supporting_evidence: Transaction deterioration is not explained by store count alone
counter_evidence: Demand source (resident, worker, tourist) is not observed
interpretation_boundary: Transaction-based weakening is observed; its demand source is not identified.

predicted_pattern: Leeum declines more than similarly configured 2022 areas
supporting_evidence: The selected comparison areas decline less in the observed series
counter_evidence: The selected controls remain materially unbalanced (max |SMD| exceeds 0.25) and omit tourist exposure, rent, and museum visits
interpretation_boundary: This is a descriptive comparison, not a credible causal control.

counter_evidence: 2021 incomplete Korean data, unbalanced controls, and unavailable causal covariates
verdict: 2022년 고점 이후 거래기반 약화 관측; 구조적 쇠퇴 원인은 식별 불가
interpretation_boundary: The score is reproduced, but this is not a structural-decline causal conclusion.
